description: The housekeeping manager needs to order more cleaning chemicals as stock is running low.

nodes.task_description: Check the current inventory level of the required cleaning chemical.

expected_outcome.value: The system shows the stock is below the reorder point.

nodes.task_description: Create a purchase order for the chemical from the approved vendor.

expected_outcome.value: A new purchase order is created in the procurement system.

nodes.task_description: Send the purchase order to the vendor.

expected_outcome.value: The PO is successfully transmitted to the vendor.
